Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez

Video.summary: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Video.summary: Justin Basra takes on Jacob Smith at HK51. Justin comes with a tough wrestling background and ends with some lower back tightness. Cam MacDonald fights Sean Michaels and ends with a Tap Out! Cam had a hard weight cut and see how that impacts his fight against Sean Michaels.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
Video.title: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

HKFC 21 - Andy Jack v. Dillon Adam
HKFC 21 - Andy Jack v. Dillon Adam

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi

Video.summary: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski

Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
